attribution: canvas-toolbox coarse agency model. The three modes ARE the three tiers — the revert target from the finer aimodes profile. No external attribution.

tiers.label: Passivity
tiers.description: Student outsources thinking; AI produces, student receives.

tiers.label: Partnership
tiers.description: Student and AI think together; shared cognitive load.

tiers.label: Agency
tiers.description: Student drives and checks the AI; AI serves the student's direction.

modes.label: Passivity
modes.definition: Student takes AI output as-is — asks for answers or delegates production.

modes.label: Partnership
modes.definition: Student learns with or works alongside the AI — explanation-seeking or joint iteration.

modes.label: Agency
modes.definition: Student drives — verifies their own work, expands options, invites critique, or sets the problem.
